hero.title: Themed Events
hero.subtitle: From taco bars to Oktoberfest, holiday feasts to luau parties — we bring your themed event vision to life with incredible food and presentation.

themesGrid.subheadline: We've catered hundreds of themed events. Here are some of our most requested — but the sky's the limit!

items.title: Taco & Chili Bars
items.description: Build-your-own taco stations and hearty chili bars that bring the fiesta to your event.

items.title: BBQ Cookout
items.description: Smoky, savory BBQ spreads with all the classic fixings. Perfect for summer gatherings.

items.title: Oktoberfest
items.description: Bratwurst, pretzels, and German-inspired fare. Prost to great food!

items.title: Luau Party
items.description: Tropical flavors and island vibes. Hawaiian shirts optional but encouraged!

items.title: Holiday Celebrations
items.description: Thanksgiving feasts, Christmas dinners, and New Year's spreads done right.

items.title: Valentine's & Love
items.description: Romantic spreads for team appreciation or special celebrations.

items.title: Mardi Gras
items.description: Laissez les bons temps rouler! Cajun flavors, king cake, and New Orleans flair.

items.title: Custom Themes
items.description: Have a unique idea? We love creating custom themed experiences!

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Share your theme idea, event details, and guest count. We love hearing your creative ideas!

steps.title: We Design The Menu
steps.description: We'll craft a custom menu that perfectly matches your theme with options for every dietary need.

steps.title: We Bring The Party
steps.description: We handle setup, presentation, and cleanup. You focus on enjoying your event!

finalCta.headline: Ready to Party?
finalCta.subheadline: Let's create something amazing together. Tell us about your themed event and we'll make it unforgettable!
